subject: [PATCH v1 00/17] fuse: extend passthrough to inode operations

reviews.author: Joanne Koong
reviews.summary: Identified a double-put bug in fuse_try_move_page() where the folio refcount drops to zero prematurely. Suggested adding an extra folio_get() before replace_page_cache_folio() to maintain the reference.

reviews.author: Joanne Koong
reviews.summary: Added an arg for a struct fuse_statx pointer to fuse_iget() and passed it through to fuse_change_attributes_i() so the statx attributes get persisted in cache.

2026-04-20.patch_summary: This patch series extends FUSE passthrough to support inode operations, including getattr, setattr, and readdir. It introduces a new mode, FUSE_PASSTHROUGH_INO, which requires one-to-one inode number mapping and allows attaching a backing file for the lifetime of the fuse inode. The patches also prepare for passthrough of additional operations, such as rename and unlink.
